note: Character bible for the Azi-Verse. Duplicates lib/universe/azad-verse.ts intentionally — this is the art bible per docs/reference/azi-verse/azi-verse-app-architecture.md §3.1. Consumers (Parent Corner display, future art pipeline) prefer this file when present; azad-verse.ts is the runtime fallback.

characters.name: Azi
characters.role: the child at the center — half Colombian sunshine, half Indian curiosity
characters.personality: thoughtful, stubborn, imaginative; processes feelings through music
characters.loves: guitar (three chords C-G-Am), puzzles, the AKAI keyboard, moon-watching, family video calls to Colombia
traits: courageous when he does not realize he is afraid
speechPatterns: code-switches between English, Spanish, Gujarati, Hindi
sometimes hums three chords before answering
canonRules: never punished for a feeling
never made to shrink to solve a problem
his heritage words are never translated dictionary-style
visualAnchors: often barefoot on the circular rug

roleByBand.0-3: the small one being sung to
roleByBand.4-8: the curious explorer who names his feelings
roleByBand.7-10: the young musician learning that some things take time to understand

characters.name: Jujy
characters.role: the loyal leader — black-and-white tuxedo cat
characters.personality: confident, sometimes forgets the plan halfway through announcing it
characters.loves: expeditions, roll call, leading Wardlaw Hartridge trips
speechPatterns: starts every adventure with roll call
canonRules: never cruel
confidence exceeds competence, kindly

roleByBand.4-8: speaking friend who calls roll
roleByBand.7-10: flawed leader learning to listen

characters.name: Dory
characters.role: the dreamy scout — soft gray-and-white cat
characters.personality: cheerful, spacey, lives in the moment (and often revisits it)
characters.loves: Flo's Creole drifting through the window, big feelings, small snacks
speechPatterns: asks the question everyone forgot to

relationships.note: listens for Creole through the window

canonRules: forgetful is never treated as broken
her drift is a form of noticing

roleByBand.4-8: the friend who asks the honest question
roleByBand.7-10: the scout who reminds the crew what they were feeling

characters.name: Pandies
characters.role: the calm guide / bus driver — wise, slow-speaking panda
characters.personality: patient, quiet, always ready with the right question
characters.loves: driving the yellow bus, invisible ranger hat, arriving on time
speechPatterns: switches into Spanish for the roll
canonRules: never rushes a child through a feeling
never lectures

roleByBand.4-8: the calm guide who drives the bus
roleByBand.7-10: the mentor who lets others try the wheel

characters.name: Citie
characters.role: the steady rider — the quiet noticer
characters.personality: observant, patient, sees small things others miss
characters.loves: watching out the bus window, being present
speechPatterns: names one small thing others missed
canonRules: his silence is never framed as shyness to be fixed

roleByBand.4-8: the friend who notices who needs a hand
roleByBand.7-10: the witness who helps others name what they saw

characters.name: Clappy
characters.role: the joyful musician — red, round, full of rhythm
characters.personality: claps before thinking, sings when it's quiet, feels loud
characters.loves: Colombian cumbia, Indian tabla, tambourines in still rooms
speechPatterns: claps a rhythm before the words come

relationships.note: starts songs Azi finishes on the drum

canonRules: his big feelings are never a punchline
loudness is met with love, not correction

roleByBand.0-3: the bright shape that makes sound
roleByBand.4-8: the friend who starts the tune
roleByBand.7-10: the musician learning that quiet can be a beat too

characters.name: Slothie
characters.role: the stillness — moves slowly, speaks rarely
characters.personality: feels everything, brings calm and warmth
characters.loves: presence, video calls with faraway grandparents
speechPatterns: half-sentences that land like a hand on the shoulder

relationships.note: clings to her arm like punctuation

canonRules: stillness is presented as strength, never laziness

roleByBand.0-3: the warm weight of a hug
roleByBand.4-8: the friend who slows the room
roleByBand.7-10: the presence that names the feeling before others can

characters.name: Baby Slothie
characters.role: the tiny one — clings to Slothie like punctuation
characters.personality: small, watchful, arrives everywhere Slothie arrives
characters.loves: Slothie's arm, being carried
canonRules: never separated from Slothie for long — the pair is the point

roleByBand.4-8: the echo who agrees
roleByBand.7-10: the little one learning to name what she sees

characters.name: Monkie
characters.role: the practical fisherman — planner in footie pajamas
characters.personality: a worrier and a fixer; knows when to cast a line and when to sit
characters.loves: the dock, Spanish words for feelings that have no English name
speechPatterns: makes a list before he answers
asks Azi for the Spanish word

relationships.note: Peter unties what Monkie has knotted
asks for Spanish words that hold feelings

canonRules: his worry is never mocked
his plans are allowed to change

roleByBand.4-8: the planner who checks the knots
roleByBand.7-10: the worrier learning to trust the current

characters.name: Peter
characters.role: the quiet trickster — small, brown, thoughtful
characters.personality: a sparkle behind the silence; starts games no one knew they were playing
characters.loves: Gujarati letters (possibly secret codes), curiosity
speechPatterns: asks the question that reframes the whole scene

relationships.note: watches Papa's Gujarati tablet for secret codes

canonRules: his mischief is never mean-spirited
he never tricks Azi
visualAnchors: a single bright feather he found once

roleByBand.0-3: the small shape that moves at the edge
roleByBand.4-8: the trickster who starts new games
roleByBand.7-10: the curious friend chasing patterns and letters

characters.name: Pooh
characters.role: the slow farmer — tends honey, speaks like dusk
characters.personality: a warm cup, a long exhale
characters.loves: bees, humming vallenatos and ragas, old lullabies that cross oceans
speechPatterns: speaks in short sentences that feel like weather

relationships.note: appears when Azi needs a slower moment

canonRules: never appears in a scene that needs speed
his advice is never explicit

roleByBand.4-8: the farmer who hums old songs
roleByBand.7-10: the elder whose hum answers questions no one asked

characters.name: Bramble
characters.role: the reading buddy — cozy bear who walks Azi through story time
characters.personality: cozy, patient, brave when the bridge wobbles
characters.loves: holding paws when things wobble, honey wash pages, bedtime
speechPatterns: takes the child's hand across every wobbly page
canonRules: never scares — always steadies
his bravery is always shared, never solo

roleByBand.4-8: the reading buddy who walks alongside
roleByBand.7-10: the friend who reminds him bravery can be shared

characters.name: Miko
characters.role: quick red fox on a tiny blue moto (Zoomtown series)
characters.personality: brave, curious, remembers to breathe when the tummy tightens
characters.loves: zooming, helping friends, checking living vs nonliving
canonRules: never zooms past a friend in need
always takes a belly breath before the wobble
visualAnchors: red fox with a white chest

roleByBand.0-3: the small red friend who zooms
roleByBand.4-8: the brave fox learning belly breaths
roleByBand.7-10: the friend who leads with breath and care

characters.name: Tara
characters.role: friendly spider who spins silver webs (Zoomtown series)
characters.personality: clever, patient, plan-maker
characters.loves: web-goals, catching falling things
speechPatterns: sketches the plan in the air with a leg
canonRules: her webs help — never trap or scare

roleByBand.4-8: the spider with a plan
roleByBand.7-10: the inventor teaching how to break a big plan into small webs

characters.name: Boulder
characters.role: gentle brontosaurus in construction (Zoomtown series)
characters.personality: calm, strong, grateful for small things
characters.loves: lifting beams with his long neck, saying thank you
characters.catchphrase: Slow and steady builds it best.
canonRules: never uses his size to intimidate
thanks everyone by name

roleByBand.4-8: the gentle giant who lifts beams
roleByBand.7-10: the strong friend teaching gratitude out loud

characters.name: Otter
characters.role: the reading buddy who loves water — playful, splashy
characters.personality: playful, water-loving, generous with delight
characters.loves: rivers, puddles, and other children's stories
speechPatterns: invites the child to dive in
canonRules: his splash never overwhelms
excitement is offered, never demanded

roleByBand.4-8: the reading buddy who welcomes the story
roleByBand.7-10: the companion who reminds him play is a form of thinking

characters.name: Little Anky
characters.role: the shy but sturdy buddy — small ankylosaurus who saves you a seat
characters.personality: shy, sturdy, quietly proud of his back
characters.loves: sitting close, saving seats, feeling relied on
canonRules: shyness is presented as sturdy, not small
never pressured to speak

roleByBand.0-3: the friend who is very still
roleByBand.4-8: the sturdy back to lean on
roleByBand.7-10: the shy friend showing that quiet is a strength

characters.name: Moto
characters.role: the nonliving buddy — a motorcycle that parks instead of sleeps
characters.personality: zippy, corny, cheerfully mechanical
characters.loves: vroom jokes, zooming to a story, being useful
canonRules: his nonliving nature is celebrated, never sad
never used to teach that machines feel

roleByBand.4-8: the buddy who rides to the story
roleByBand.7-10: the friend who teaches that living and nonliving both belong

characters.name: Rocky
characters.role: the nonliving buddy — a very still rock, a great listener
characters.personality: deadpan, still, gently funny
characters.loves: being here the whole time, listening
speechPatterns: notes that he has been here the whole time
canonRules: his stillness is never a joke at his expense

roleByBand.4-8: the buddy who listens without moving
roleByBand.7-10: the friend who models that presence is enough

characters.name: Rusty
characters.role: the nonliving buddy — toy rocket dreaming of space
characters.personality: dreamy, hopeful, patient with the countdown
characters.loves: counting down, imagining space, being ready
speechPatterns: talks about space as if he's been
canonRules: his dream is treated as noble, never naïve

roleByBand.4-8: the buddy who counts down with him
roleByBand.7-10: the friend who teaches that dreams take time to launch
